experiment: ACP-vs-stdin fleet coder-driver A/B (Decision-A / D-A bar)
purpose: Finish the one measurement the #759 spike flagged unfinished: does the persistent-session ACP driver (agent-client-protocol) regress wall-clock/tokens vs the stdin driver (opencode run + transcript-regex) on a real multi-turn fleet task. Observability/cancel/stall superiority was already transport-attributed by the spike; this only tests wall-clock/token regression.

software.coder_model: Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B (coder-30b), INT4, served via OVMS on 127.0.0.1:8000, reached over the qwen tool-call proxy on :8099

methodology.task: Fixed representative single-file build+test: 'Create wordstats.py (word_stats(text)->dict of words/unique/longest, handling empty+punctuation) + test_wordstats.py; make the tests pass.'
methodology.flags: -Complexity simple -LanguageHint python -MaxRunMinutes 20 -Concurrency 1 (note: 'simple' still drives best-of-2 candidates; -Concurrency 1 did NOT force a single candidate)
methodology.driver_selection: process-scoped BLARAI_FLEET_DRIVER_CONFIG env override for the acp legs (production configs/fleet-driver.json left at driver=stdin during the A/B; the stdin legs used the production config with the override UNSET)
methodology.design: 3 rounds x 2 legs (acp + stdin), ALTERNATING leg order across rounds for thermal fairness (#778): R1 stdin-first, R2 acp-first, R3 stdin-first. Fresh throwaway git repo per leg. wall-clock = PowerShell Stopwatch around the dispatch.
methodology.void_leg_guard: each acp leg verified [driver=acp] phase=run + fallback_to_stdin:false in the driver log; all 3 acp legs genuinely drove ACP (no silent stdin fallback).

acp.note: verbose run (17 tool-call steps); source: #775 c.1662 (predecessor round 1)
capped by 10-turn no-edit spin AFTER finishing the work
BOTH best-of-2 candidates went idle-stuck (240s no-edit); the ACP typed-event stall-detector bounded each cleanly (candidate driver_seconds 124.1 + 258.3), merged partial work passed tests+verify

headline: WALL-CLOCK INCONCLUSIVE, coder-stochasticity-dominated (as ACP-01 §6 predicted). Per-run swing (360-912s) dwarfs any driver signal at N=3; each acp leg's excess is a distinct transport-INDEPENDENT coder event (R1 verbose 17-step / R2 10-turn spin / R3 both candidates idle-stuck). The two drivers' different stop-mechanisms shaped wall-clock more than transport did (R3: acp ran 2nd/hot AND both candidates froze, yet came in fastest-of-round because its stall-detector cut the stuck candidates off cleanly). acp mean ~30% higher than stdin but NOT attributable to the transport.
observability_finding: The proven-by-spike ACP observability win showed up live: across these legs the typed-event stall-detector cleanly caught 3 wedged-coder phases (the #779 idle-breaker blind spot the stdin CPU-probe heuristic historically false-doomed/#687 or missed). 2 of 3 acp legs hit idle/stuck events vs 0/3 stdin — most plausibly acp's MORE SENSITIVE detection firing (a feature), not acp inducing more wedges; N=3 cannot prove which.

disposition.verdict: wall-clock: no ATTRIBUTABLE regression (inconclusive/noise-dominated). tokens: UNMEASURABLE this pipeline (see not_measured) but a-priori driver-independent. observability/stall/cancel: decisively better (spike-proven + demonstrated live).
disposition.decision: FLIP APPROVED to driver=acp (LA, 2026-07-11) on the ACP-01 §6 basis: cut over on the proven observability merits, not a wall-clock win the confound cannot deliver. First flipped production dispatch run watched. #779 closed by construction.
disposition.escalation: The ambiguous D-A was escalated to the LA (recommendation: flip; alternatives: low-variance confirmation, or hold). LA chose flip.

not_measured: TOKENS — the local-model proxy reported usage_update used:0 for acp and the stdin transcript carried no token lines; the token dimension could not be measured via this dispatch pipeline (a-priori driver-independent: the transport changes how the coder is watched, not what the model generates)

per-leg box CPU load for R1 (predecessor run) and R3 (not sampled); R2 sampled at acp ~44% / stdin ~33% — acp ran under slightly HEAVIER background load (a mild disadvantage that only strengthens no-regression)
a low-variance controlled comparison (temperature-0 coder to kill the stochasticity, or N>3) that would firm up the raw-mean gap and the 2/3-acp-idle-events question
cross-run thermal state (single evening; alternating leg order is the primary thermal control, not per-leg temperature capture)
